# `nise sync`

- **Usage**: `nise sync <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/sync/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/sync/mod.rs)

Synchronize tools from other version managers with nise

## Subcommands

- [`nise sync node [FLAGS]`](/cli/sync/node.md)
- [`nise sync python [--pyenv] [--uv]`](/cli/sync/python.md)
- [`nise sync ruby [--brew]`](/cli/sync/ruby.md)
